posted_text:
Hot take for Founder/Owner: if your dashboard looks better than your close rate, your system is broken.

Topic: ai_ops
Most teams optimize reporting before fixing execution.

What metric are you tracking that actually changes behavior this week?

winner_context.business_pain: Teams deploy AI tools without a reliable operating workflow.
winner_context.why_fit: Ask operators to share their current bottleneck or handoff failure.
